presentation.latex: xt = Wrecσ(xt−1) + Winut + b (2) The parameters of the model are given by the recurrent weight matrix Wrec, the biases b and input weight matrix Win, collected in θ for the general case. x0 is provided by the user, set to zero or learned, andσ is an element-wise function (usually the tanh or sigmoid).
presentation.unicode_plain: xt = Wrecσ(xt−1) + Winut + b (2) The parameters of the model are given by the recurrent weight matrix Wrec, the biases b and input weight matrix Win, collected in θ for the general case. x0 is provided by the user, set to zero or learned, andσ is an element-wise function (usually the tanh or sigmoid).
